message:
fix(abi,malloc): add RuntimeReadyGuard for test isolation and replace raw alloc with safe Box-backed test allocator

runtime_policy.rs: Introduce RuntimeReadyGuard RAII struct that
saves/restores RUNTIME_READY and MODE_LOG_READY atomics, ensuring
tests that need the runtime kernel enabled don't leak state to
other tests running concurrently. Applied to
drive_runtime_evidence_sampling and the snapshot wrapper test.

allocator.rs: Replace unsafe std::alloc::{alloc,dealloc} test helpers
with a safe HashMap<usize, Box<[u8]>> registry behind a OnceLock<Mutex>.
test_alloc() creates a boxed slice and registers it by pointer address;
test_free() removes the entry and asserts it was known. This eliminates
undefined behavior from mismatched Layout parameters and makes test
allocations fully deterministic and leak-detectable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
